calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Electrical Staffing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Titan Electrical.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration of Philip J. Mussallem in support of Default Judgment. Declaration of Steven A Booska are admitted in evidence.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $150,252.36
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $20,195.81
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $525.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $171,973.17
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
